# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongConfiguration
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  plugins:
    cors:
      enabled_at: global,service,route
      allow_origin_regexp: ["^https?://(www\.)?(yourwebsite\.com|anotherwebsite\.com)$"]
      allowed_methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
      max_age: 3600
      allow_credentials: true
      headers:
        Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "*"

    auth:
      jwt:
        enabled_at: global,service,route
        trusted-issuer: "yourjwttokenissuer"
        secret: "yourjwttokensecret"
        verification-key: "yourjwtvkey"
        allowed-algorithms: ["RS256"]

    rate-limiting:
      enabled_at: global,service,route
      limited-connections: 1000
      limit-per-ip: 10
      real-ip-header: X-Real-IP
      remote-ip-header: X-Forwarded-For
      block-on-exceed: true
      block-for: 60s
